description: This alchemy recipe is used for the Alchemy profession. It is sold by Evie Whirlbrew. In the Alchemy Recipes category. An item from Classic World of Warcraft.
name: Recipe: Major Healing Potion

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Recipe: Major Healing Potion Item Level 55 Requires Alchemy (275) Use: Teaches you how to make a Major Healing Potion. (2 Min Cooldown) Max Stack: 5 Sell Price: 10 Requires Golden Sansam (2), Mountain Silversage , Crystal Vial This alchemy recipe is used for the Alchemy profession. It is sold by Evie Whirlbrew.
